captures.notes: Canonical Codrops tutorial link for attribution and technical framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing sentinel heads, trail routes, position-history slices, flow vectors, and tunnel scaffold; not copied from the Matrix Sentinels demo.
Local generated motion clip isolates route tracing, head motion, and history-buffer shimmer; not copied from the Matrix Sentinels demo.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated trail routes, history slices, sentinel heads, flow vectors, and CSS-only trace motion.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.learning_primitive: sentinel head plus history trail particle system
payload.visual_role: makes particle motion readable as temporal state rather than a decorative scatter field

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: still image, motion clip, and code note all represent the same trail-state primitive.

payload.scaffold_model: concentric ellipses and diagonal guides define a tunnel coordinate field
payload.state_model: current head plus stored previous positions along each path
payload.translation_value: maps directly to evidence trails, reasoning paths, and time-dependent review state

modules.review_notes: Data-tunnel layer is complete because route, history, current-state, and flow-field components are all visible and named.

payload.source_boundary: does not claim Codrops TSL code, compute shader logic, storage buffer layout, camera, or demo assets

modules.review_notes: Material notes are complete for teaching pass separation and trail-state emphasis without claiming upstream shaders.

payload.input_model: flow-vector field stands in for hidden force/noise steering

modules.review_notes: Interaction state is represented as named simulation layers plus still and motion evidence.

payload.runtime_target: offline SVG/CSS review exercise; production analogue would use TSL compute, storage buffers, and position-history textures

modules.review_notes: Runtime payload is complete because it names bounded counts and the production analogue without claiming upstream implementation.

payload.evidence_layer: local PNG proves head/history/route/flow layers, local GIF proves trace motion, HTML note proves the rebuild taxonomy
payload.review_gap: canonical tutorial remains link-only; local rebuild teaches mechanics without upstream media
payload.route_decision: use sentinel heads for active claims, history slices for evidence memory, trail routes for reasoning paths, and flow vectors for hidden review pressure
payload.source_trail: canonical Codrops tutorial plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact upstream TSL compute and simulation scale are not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, review gap, route decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: 2025 TSL particle trail tutorial rebuilt as a local sentinel-head, history-buffer, flow-field, and data-tunnel learning primitive with still, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Matrix Sentinels Dynamic Particle Trails
why_relevant: Completes a data-tunnel anchor for the atlas by teaching particle trajectories as stored temporal evidence rather than decorative scatter.
